skipped_classes.label: Level 2 免疫自愈
skipped_classes.selection_rule: 0.40 <= fail_score < 0.50 且局部建链失效比例 <= 0.25

skipped_classes.label: Level 3 批量冗余自愈
skipped_classes.selection_rule: 0.40 <= fail_score < 0.50 且至少一个目标节点局部建链失效比例 > 0.25

data_contract.failed_agent_source: AttackSummary lines in the selected performance files
data_contract.per_agent_fail_score_policy: Main pipeline outputs scenario/test-level fail scores, not per-agent fail scores; Part3 passes each selected scenario fail score to its observed failed agents.
data_contract.missing_data_policy: No failed agents are synthesized when AttackSummary data is absent; missing self-healing classes are skipped and reported.
